visual_description: At night, an exterior view shows tall buildings under a dark blue sky, illuminated by streetlights and a distant tower, with trees in the foreground. The scene shifts indoors to an office where several men in white shirts and dark trousers walk through a workspace with desks, glass partitions, and hanging pendant lights, moving toward a television screen on the wall. The men stand and observe the screen while others linger near the desks, with the office lit by overhead lighting.
